info.description: This is a sample server for History API.
info.title: History API

post.description: Initiate password recovery process for a user

get.description: Receives the auth code from Google, exchanges it for tokens, creates/logs in the user, and redirects back to the frontend with application tokens.
Generates a state string, sets it in a cookie, and redirects the user to Google's consent page.

post.description: Logout current user and revoke tokens
Generate a new access token using a valid refresh token from context
Authenticate user credentials and return access/refresh tokens
Create a new user account in the system
Request a new token for specific actions like email confirmation
Validate an OTP or email verification token

get.description: Generate a presigned URL for direct upload to storage

post.description: Confirm that upload via presigned URL is completed

get.description: Retrieve a media file by its ID

delete.description: Delete a media file by ID

get.description: Get a list of all roles in the system
Get detailed information about a specific role
Fetch vector or raster map tile data by Z, X, Y coordinates
Search and filter users with pagination (Admin/Mod only)
Retrieve the profile information of the currently authenticated user
Retrieve media list of the currently authenticated user
Retrieve details of a specific user (Admin/Mod only)

put.description: Update the profile details of the currently authenticated user

delete.description: Soft delete a user account (Admin/Mod only)

get.description: Retrieve media list by specific user ID
get.summary: Get user's media by user ID

patch.description: Update the password for the currently authenticated user
Restore a soft-deleted user account (Admin/Mod only)
Update the role of a user (Admin only)

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer " followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
